answer:
**The work is the *Viṣṇu Smṛti* (also known as Vishnu Smriti), Chapter 1.**[^7]

This chapter opens with Vishnu incarnating as the cosmic Boar (Varāha) to rescue the Earth (personified as Vasumatī, Vasudhā, or Dhara) from submersion in the cosmic waters. His form symbolically embodies the Vedic sacrifice, including "tusks were the sacrificial post" and "tongue was the sacrificial fire" (Vi_1.3–9):[^1]

> He, the great ascetic, whose feet were the Vedas, whose tusks were the sacrificial post, whose teeth were the sacrifice, whose mouth was the fire-altar,  
> Whose tongue was the sacrificial fire...[^1]

After recreating the world and distributing the waters, the Boar "went to a destination then unknown to the worlds" (Vi_1.18), vanishing and leaving the Earth to wonder, "What will be my support now?" (Vi_1.19).[^2]

She takes the form of a beautiful woman "with lips auspicious and red like the Bandhujīva flower" (Vi_1.22), decides to consult the sage Kashyapa (Vi_1.20–21),[^3] and at his direction—which reveals Vishnu's abode "in the Ocean of Milk" (Vi_1.32)—travels there.[^4] There, she finds the reclining Vishnu (on the serpent Śeṣa) and asks, "what will be my support?" (Vi_1.46).[^5] Vishnu replies that good people devoted to *varṇa* and *āśrama* dharma will support her, then seats her "on this excellent golden throne" (Vi_1.64) before expounding the law.[^6]

[^1]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.3](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-979e7a).
[^2]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.18](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-d6fb26).
[^3]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.19–22](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-7b2100).
[^4]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.30–32](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-ec5720).
[^5]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.46](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-5eec19).
[^6]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, [Vi_1.64](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/#p-398224).
[^7]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, Chapter 1, [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/01/translation/).
